name: tmux
description: tmux terminal-multiplexer usage skill (sessions, windows, panes, scripting)

interface.shortDescription: tmux usage skill for scripting and agent automation.
interface.longDescription: Codex wrapper for the tmux plugin. Reuses the tmux usage skill for spawning, driving, and reading tmux sessions, windows, and panes.
defaultPrompt: Spawn a detached tmux session and run a command in it.
Capture the output of a tmux pane by its pane id.
Explain how to target tmux panes reliably from a script.
